Faster competency. Higher engagement.

Agentic Learning with Scholé.

Faster competency. Higher engagement. Agentic Learning with Scholé.

Scholé uses the best of AI to construct exactly the right lesson for each learner. It’s targeted, practical, and built on 10+ years of AI for education research from EPFL and UC Berkeley.

The adoption gap is real.

Scholé closes it.

The adoption gap is real. Scholé closes it.

Scholé helps every employee understand why AI is relevant to their role.

Learning that adapts to each person

Every employee follows a path built around their tools, skills, and pace. The platform adjusts in real time as they progress. Grounded in 10+ years of research from EPFL and UC Berkeley.

Learning that adapts to each person

Every employee follows a path built around their tools, skills, and pace. The lesson content adjusts in real time as they progress.

Content tied to daily work

Every lesson maps to the learner's actual tools (Notion, Excel, PowerPoint) and job function. They see immediately how their learning applies to their role.

You bought the tools - ChatGPT, Copilot, Gemini, Claude.

But if employees don't know how to use them in their daily work, you're not getting the return. Your employees have different tasks, tools, backgrounds. They don’t all need to learn the same thing, the same way. That's exactly the problem Scholé was built to solve.

Add a new subsection on “Descriptive Statistics”

Change modality of “Understanding data types” to “Interactive”

Testimonials

Teams at these organizations are already learning on Scholé

Teams at these organizations are already learning on Scholé

Teams at these organizations are already learning on Scholé

“We have been working with Scholé over the past year on AI literacy and scenario- based AI learning, and it has already significantly improved perceptions of AI at Decathlon Switzerland while helping reshape our learning strategy and future direction. The solution we have co-designed is truly AI-native from the ground up, and both robust and comprehensive. The HR dashboard is one of the most business-oriented I have encountered, a true asset for any L&D leader whose role is increasingly evolving to align more closely with business priorities.”

“We have been working with Scholé over the past year on AI literacy and scenario- based AI learning, and it has already significantly improved perceptions of AI at Decathlon Switzerland while helping reshape our learning strategy and future direction. The solution we have co-designed is truly AI-native from the ground up, and both robust and comprehensive. The HR dashboard is one of the most business-oriented I have encountered, a true asset for any L&D leader whose role is increasingly evolving to align more closely with business priorities.”

“AI fluency will set people and companies apart. And the companies that use Scholé will give their people the advantage they need. We work with Vini and her team at Scholé to teach Harvard Data Science Initiative students online, and there is simply no comparison. They are the best.”

Raphaëlle Rey · Leader of People Development & Apprenticeship

Where research meets product

Meet the People

Behind Scholé

Meet the People Behind Scholé

Talk to our team

Scholé is born from Swiss excellence in AI research and from Vinitra and Paola's 10+ years at the intersection of AI and education.

Our story began at EPFL, inside the Machine Learning for Education Lab. Together, they've authored over 40 research papers on personalized learning, LLMs, and knowledge tracing.

Now, they are translating cutting-edge research into a platform for real employees in real companies.

Talk to our team

Vinitra Swamy, PhD

CEO & Co-Founder

Scaled up UC Berkeley’s Foundations of Data Science course from 100 to 1,700 in-person students (and 60,000 online).

UC Berkeley

Microsoft AI

EPFL CS PhD

Paola Mejia, PhD

CTO & Co-Founder

Developed and launched more than 12 innovative AI-driven learning tools that have been embraced by over 200,000 learners
